projects.name: RESPITE Solar + Storage
projects.notes: Regional Emergency Solar Power Intervention — feasibility completed, approved, land secured
projects.description: Regional Emergency Solar Power Intervention Project (RESPITE) deploying solar PV with battery storage across Sierra Leone. Grant-funded by the World Bank to provide rapid clean power generation capacity and reduce reliance on thermal generation.

projects.name: Bumbuna II Hydropower (143 MW)
projects.notes: Feasibility completed — pending financial close with Joule Africa
projects.description: Major new-build 143 MW hydropower project on the Seli River downstream of Bumbuna I. Flagship renewable baseload generation project requiring blended finance and debt. Pending financial close.

projects.name: MCC Compact Energy Project
projects.notes: Grant + counterpart funding — governance & grid reform, investment ready
projects.description: Comprehensive MCC Compact covering grid modernization, governance reform, transmission and distribution infrastructure, and institutional strengthening of EDSA and EGTC. Largest single grant commitment to the energy sector.

projects.name: NANT Generation (108.4 MW)
projects.notes: DFC/EBID-backed — implementation stage, PPA in place
projects.description: 108.4 MW generation project backed by US Development Finance Corporation and ECOWAS Bank for Investment and Development. Private sector-led with PPA arrangement for access expansion and emissions reduction.

projects.name: Electrification of 7 District HQ Towns
projects.notes: Government-funded — energy access expansion with community social safeguards
projects.description: Electrification of seven district headquarter towns currently without reliable power supply. Government-funded project providing generation and distribution infrastructure to underserved district capitals.

projects.name: SOGREA Solar Mini Grid
projects.notes: EU/Danish-funded — procuring contractors, clean energy access & e-waste safeguards
projects.description: Solar mini-grid deployment project funded by the European Union and Danish Government. Currently in contractor procurement phase for installing solar mini-grids across rural communities.

projects.name: Scatec Solar (40 MW)
projects.notes: Pending Cabinet Approval — solar equipment rental model, GHG emissions reduction
projects.description: 40 MW utility-scale solar PV project by Scatec using a solar equipment rental model. Feasibility completed, pending Cabinet approval. Private sector investment ready.

projects.name: Bekongor Dam (150 MW)
projects.notes: Pending Cabinet Approval — ODHAV developer, zero-emission baseload
projects.description: New-build 150 MW storage hydropower dam providing zero-emission baseload generation. Feasibility completed, regulatory approvals in place, land secured. Pending Cabinet approval for private sector development by ODHAV.

projects.name: Betmai Hydro (27 MW)
projects.notes: Pending financial close — Sewa Energy, renewable generation & low emissions
projects.description: 27 MW run-of-river hydropower project on the Sewa River developed by Sewa Energy Resource Limited. Feasibility completed, approvals in place, land secured. Pending financial close for private sector investment.

projects.name: Bumbuna I Upgrade (50→100 MW)
projects.notes: Pending funding approval — OFID/BADEA grant, clean baseload upgrade
projects.description: Upgrade of existing 50 MW Bumbuna I hydropower facility to 100 MW capacity. Includes turbine overhaul, additional generation units, spillway repair, and control system modernization. Feasibility completed, pending funding approval.

projects.name: Dodo Dam Rehabilitation (6→12 MW)
projects.notes: Bankable — sourcing for sponsor, clean baseload restoration & capacity expansion
projects.description: Rehabilitation of the existing 6 MW Dodo (Goma) hydropower plant and upgrade to 12 MW capacity. Ongoing feasibility studies, land secured. Seeking project sponsor for clean baseload restoration.

projects.name: Moyamba Singimi (15.4 MW)
projects.notes: Early stage — project report developed, full ESIA & community impact assessment required
projects.description: 15.4 MW hydropower project at Singimi in Moyamba District. Project report developed, in early feasibility stage. Significant renewable baseload potential requiring full ESIA and community impact assessment.

projects.name: Africa50 Solar Kono (50 MW)
projects.notes: Feasibility ongoing — Africa50/HGR, post-mining community safeguards apply
projects.description: 50 MW utility-scale solar PV project in Kono District, developed by Africa50 and HGR. Located on post-mining land, feasibility studies ongoing. Private sector investment ready with Africa50 ESG standards.

projects.name: Lungi Solar PV Park (65 MW)
projects.notes: Feasibility completed — LPD developer, energy security & land use safeguards required
projects.description: 65 MW utility-scale solar PV park near Lungi International Airport. Feasibility completed, approvals in place, land secured. Private sector investment ready with PPA revenue model.

projects.name: Newton SPP with BESS (15 MW)
projects.notes: Pending financial close — Taranis developer, clean generation + storage for grid resilience
projects.description: 15 MW solar power plant with battery energy storage system at Newton, near Freetown. Feasibility completed, developed by Taranis. Clean generation with storage for grid resilience. Pending financial close.

projects.name: Serengeti Baoma 1 Solar (25 MW)
projects.notes: Project ongoing — Norfund/Swedfund/Proparco/KfW consortium, GHG emission reduction
projects.description: 25 MW solar PV plant at Baoma in Bo District, developed by a consortium of Norfund, Swedfund, Proparco, Stoa, KfW, and NDF. Project ongoing with PPA in place. Clean energy access for Southern Region.

projects.name: Northern Transmission Corridor
projects.notes: Updating feasibility studies — AfDB project preparation, WAPP cross-border alignment
projects.description: 132 kV transmission corridor from Bumbuna through Makeni to Port Loko. Connects Northern Region generation to demand centers and CLSG interconnector. Updating project design with AfDB preparation support.

projects.name: Southern Transmission Corridor
projects.notes: Funding secured — MCC Compact, transmission backbone Freetown–Bo–Kenema
projects.description: Major transmission backbone from Freetown through Bo to Kenema (approx. 300 km of 132 kV double-circuit line). Includes 4 substations. Cornerstone of MCC Compact investment enabling Southern and Eastern electrification.

projects.name: ESLEAP Distribution & Access
projects.notes: World Bank grant — enhancing distribution and energy access, implementation stage
projects.description: Enhancing Sierra Leone Energy Access Project (ESLEAP) — World Bank-funded distribution infrastructure and last-mile access expansion. Feasibility completed, approved, land secured, and in implementation.

projects.name: Connecting the Mines
projects.notes: Bankable — sourcing sponsor, affordable power to mining sector & GHG reduction
projects.description: 66 kV transmission spur lines connecting major mining operations (Tonkolili iron ore, Koidu diamond) to the national grid. Enables anchor load offtake and cross-subsidization of rural electrification.

projects.name: ECOWAS 20/20 Clean Cooking
projects.notes: Awaiting fund disbursement — emissions reduction, indoor air quality & deforestation reduction
projects.description: ECOWAS 20/20 Clean Cooking Initiative providing subsidized improved cookstoves and LPG distribution. Grant-funded with existing distributor licenses. Targets emissions reduction, indoor air quality improvement, and deforestation reduction.

projects.name: National Dispatch Center
projects.notes: Funding secured — MCC Compact, SCADA/EMS grid monitoring
projects.description: Modern SCADA/EMS-based National Load Dispatch Center in Freetown. Enables real-time grid monitoring, load management, fault detection, and integration of variable renewable energy sources.

projects.name: Solar Standalone Systems
projects.notes: 400,000 households targeted with Tier 1 and Tier 2 access
projects.description: Distribution of 400,000 solar home systems (Tier 1: solar lanterns and phone charging; Tier 2: multi-light systems with radio/TV capability) to unelectrified rural households. Includes RBF subsidy and consumer financing.

projects.name: 200+ Mini Grids
projects.notes: 104 existing + 100 pipeline supported by development partners
projects.description: Deployment of 200+ solar-hybrid mini-grids across rural Sierra Leone. Average 50–200 kW per site with battery storage. Targets market towns, health centers, and schools. Includes 104 existing sites and 100 in pipeline.
